'''Malthorn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] publicity agent employed by [[Alexis Cov-Prim]]. He also worked as [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] to fund some of Alexis' dealings.<ref name="The Shard of Alderaan" />

{{Char-stub}}
